mapper.select: SELECT enrollment_id, student_id, course_id, semester, status FROM enrollment ORDER BY enrollment_id
SELECT enrollment_id, student_id, course_id, semester, status FROM enrollment WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY enrollment_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO enrollment ( student_id, course_id, semester, status ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{semester}, #{status} )
